--CREATE VIEW [rehandle_forecast]
	

 as select * FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'gold/wi_rehandle_forecast', data_source = 'workinstruction', FORMAT = 'DELTA' ) AS [rehandle_forecast]


select * FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'silver/workinstruction', data_source = 'malta', FORMAT = 'DELTA' ) AS [rehandle_forecast]

select max

CREATE OR ALTER VIEW [rehandle_forecast] as 
select * FROM OPENROWSET( BULK 'gold/wi_rehandle_forecast', data_source = 'workinstruction', FORMAT = 'DELTA' ) AS [rehandle_forecast]

select * from dbo.WI_Moves_Distribution


CREATE  or ALTER VIEW rehandle_forecast AS 
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET( 
    BULK 'gold/wi_rehandle_forecast', 
    data_source = 'workinstruction', 
    FORMAT = 'DELTA' 
) AS [Main]
WHERE source_file_name_sort = (
    SELECT MAX(source_file_name_sort) 
    FROM OPENROWSET( 
        BULK 'gold/wi_rehandle_forecast', 
        data_source = 'workinstruction', 
        FORMAT = 'DELTA' 
    ) AS [Sub] 
);


SELECT definition 
FROM sys.sql_modules 
WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID('dbo.rehandle_forecast');
